description: Rudder is infrastructure management and security software for automating configuration, patching, and compliance across Linux and Windows environments. It is used to manage nodes, policies, compliance, inventories, and related system administration tasks.
summary: rudder.io exposes documented HTTP APIs for Rudder: a public REST API authenticated by `X-API-Token`, plus an internal/publicly exposed relay API with case-by-case auth that is not developer-mintable; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were confirmed on rudder.io.
